opportunities.description:
[HIRING] Illustrator/Designer for Cannabis Accessories Brand

Looking for an illustrator/designer with a cute/y2k art style. I have a cannabis brand and looking to hire one more designer to the team! Currently there’s 3. Appreciate unique aesthetics, our main focus is creating a variety of designs that appeal to multiple demographics with a cute flare. We have a lot of pending work, if works out opportunity to be a permanent member and recurring weekly/monthly work.
